channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: After leaving OpenAI, Mira Murati debuts her AI startup, Thinking Machines Lab
item.description: Thinking Machines Lab, an AI startup founded by former OpenAI Chief Technology Officer Mira Murati, has tapped about 30 leading researchers and engineers from competitors such as OpenAI, Meta and Mistral, it said in a blog post on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Airbnb sues New Orleans for trying to make it responsible for regulating short term rentals
item.description: Airbnb is suing the City of New Orleans for requiring the company and other short-term rental platforms ensure properties they market are in compliance with city regulations.
item.dc:creator: Jack Brook, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: More than 150 false killer whales stranded on a beach in Australia's Tasmania state
item.description: More than 150 false killer whales are stranded on a remote beach on Australia’s island state of Tasmania.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Federal workers fired by Elon Musk’s DOGE are sharing their anxieties on Reddit
item.description: Elon Musk’s aggressive push to cut government spending reached new heights on Valentine’s Day, as employees across more than two dozen federal government departments were abruptly fired on Valentine’s Day—with those let go warning it could impact how the government operates.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: An obscure French startup just launched the cheapest true 5K monitor in the world right now and I can't wait to test it
item.description: JapanNext challenges the market with an affordable 5K monitor, delivering high resolution and color accuracy at a low price point.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: AI-created disinformation could bring down banks
item.description: A new report by UK analyst firm Say No to Disinfo and communications firm Fenimore Harper indicates a high risk that AI-generated disinformation could create bank runs that could bring down financial institutions, according to Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Sea turtles return to the Atlantic Ocean off Florida after being stunned by the cold
item.description: Eight green sea turtles stunned by the cold during a rare snowfall in Florida have been released back into the Atlantic Ocean.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: These fantastic sites will save you from ever getting a bad seat again
item.description: When you’re booking travel, scoring a ticket to a sporting event, or securing yourself a spot at some other sort of show, you’re frequently faced with the impossible-seeming task of committing to a specific seat—on the spot. It may seem simple.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: Fancy a drone destroyer? Someone transformed a Framework 16 laptop into a UAV killer thanks to a custom SDR module
item.description: A hardware designer has developed a drone jammer using a custom SDR module for the Framework modular laptop.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: How drones may be a big help to first responders in the future
item.description: A recent challenge sponsored by NIST tasked drone designers with creating a system to help first responders map indoor environments. The post How drones may be a big help to first responders in the future first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: AircoveOS v5 Update: ExpressVPN's Router Just Got a Lot Smarter
item.description: ExpressVPN's Aircove and Aircove Go devices get major upgrades, including faster speeds, improved security, and new features like guest Wi-Fi.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Don't let AI phantom hackers drain your bank account
item.description: Attackers use caller ID spoofing and AI voices to steal money. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson provides seven ways to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DOGE says it has saved government $55B so far
item.description: The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) in a post on its website says it has found $55 billion in savings through a combination of efforts, including a reduction in the federal workforce.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: DOGE and Musk: The 5 biggest controversies so far
item.description: Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has caused uproar almost from the moment of its inception. DOGE is not an official government department, despite its name. Only Congress can create new departments.
item.dc:creator: Niall Stanage, The Hill

item.title: Serverless was never a cure-all
item.description: An obituary for serverless computing might read something like this: In loving memory of serverless computing, born from the fervent hopes of developers and cloud architects alike.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Neudesic seeks to speed up AI adoption for IT teams
item.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) has gained significant traction among business leaders keen to explore ways it can drive operational efficiencies and cost savings. But while top leadership is sold on its potential, it’s a different tale for IT teams working the ground.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 5 free time-saving Windows apps every PC should have
item.description: Whether you’re setting up a new Windows PC or looking to enhance your current setup, there are some life-changing apps you can grab for free that will transform how you use your computer.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: How to keep AI hallucinations out of your code
item.description: It turns out androids do dream, and their dreams are often strange. In the early days of generative AI, we got human hands with eight fingers and recipes for making pizza sauce from glue. Now, developers working with AI-assisted coding tools are also finding AI hallucinations in their code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What changes to the CHIPS act could mean for AI growth and consumers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Even as he's vowed to push the United States ahead in artificial intelligence research, President Donald Trump's threats to alter federal government contracts with chipmakers and slap new tariffs on the semiconductor industry may put new speed bumps in front of the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Musk says he'll withdraw $97.4 billion bid for OpenAI if ChatGPT maker remains nonprofit
item.description: Elon Musk says he will abandon his $97.4 billion offer to buy the nonprofit behind OpenAI if the ChatGPT maker drops its plan to convert into a for-profit company. “If OpenAI, Inc.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: How to delete multiple text messages on a Mac and iPad
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains the steps to declutter text messages on a Mac or iPad. Apple offers ways to do this more efficiently.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
